seo_impact: Builds out the link graph between the back-pain pillar article and 4 condition-specific siblings (sciatica, hip pain, lumbar pain, sacroiliac joint pain). Cross-linking pillar pages within the same topical cluster signals topical authority to Google + distributes PageRank from the pillar across the supporting cluster. Each link is to an existing live URL (verified by fetching all 10 cluster articles via graphql_query before applying).
deferred_reason: These 5 articles totaling ~190KB of body content are deferred to a follow-up MCP batch to keep this PR's context overhead manageable. New bodies are already staged at /tmp/pain-cluster-updates/*.body.html (generated by /tmp/build-pain-related.mjs) and can be applied via the same articleUpdate mutation in a follow-up session. Cross-links planned in /tmp/pain-cluster-updates/_plan.json.
